label: positive
description: Replicates the node-ipc 9.1.6/9.2.3/12.0.1 peacenotwar/wipeout supply-chain attack. The package ships ssl-geosafe.js (a known payload filename for the node-ipc-compromise-2022 campaign) and references the bt.node.js C2 domain. The postinstall script triggers L2-POST-001. Combined with CRED-001 (reading /etc/passwd) and NETEX-001 (DNS exfil to attacker.example), this is a faithful reproduction of the 2022 CVE.
